rules.//comment: All structured data (persons, houses, rooms, boards, appliances) lives in Firestore — see firestore.rules. RTDB now holds ONLY live relay state.

$deviceId.//comment: Any authenticated user can read/write any device's relay state. ESP32s sign in as a dedicated device account; house members sign in normally. Fine-grained per-device ownership lives in Firestore (boards.deviceId) and is enforced by the backend before any RTDB write.
